title: Private keys stored plaintext in SQLite
description: persona.rs:14-22 calls private_pem.to_string() converting Zeroizing<String> to plain String before inserting into the DB. Anyone with read access to broadside.db (e.g. backup, file exfil, SQLite web admin) recovers all RSA private keys with no further crypto work. Confidentiality: all signing keys compromised. Integrity: attacker can impersonate any persona.
close_reason: Won't fix: operator accepts plaintext key storage. Single-operator server; DB file permissions are the access control boundary.
